title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. ANNOUNCES DIVIDEND
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that its Board of Directors voted to pay a cash dividend of $0.20 per share on December 15, 2023, to shareholders of record as of December 01, 2023.
